name: Lumebondé Radiance Serum
description: Brightening vitamin C serum with hyaluronic acid. Our signature product delivers instant luminosity and long-term brightening benefits. Formulated with 15% L-ascorbic acid and triple-weight hyaluronic acid for maximum efficacy.

metadata.ingredients: Water, Ascorbic Acid (15%), Hyaluronic Acid, Vitamin E, Ferulic Acid, Niacinamide
metadata.usage: Apply 3-4 drops to clean face and neck morning and evening before moisturizer

name: Hydra Glow Moisturizer
description: Deep hydration with peptides. This lightweight yet deeply nourishing moisturizer provides 72-hour hydration while improving skin texture and firmness. Formulated with ceramides and squalane.

metadata.ingredients: Water, Squalane, Peptide Complex, Hyaluronic Acid, Ceramides, Vitamin E
metadata.usage: Apply morning and evening after serum, gently press into skin

name: Silk Repair Shampoo
description: Bond repair technology for damaged hair. Our revolutionary formula rebuilds broken bonds from within, restoring strength and shine to over-processed, color-treated, or heat-damaged hair.

metadata.ingredients: Water, Sodium Lauroyl Methyl Isethionate, Bond Complex, Keratin, Silk Amino Acids
metadata.usage: Massage into wet hair, leave for 1-2 minutes, rinse thoroughly

name: Silk Repair Conditioner
description: Matching conditioner for the Silk Repair system. Seals in repair benefits while providing instant detangling and lasting softness. Infused with argan oil for extra nourishment.

metadata.ingredients: Water, Cetearyl Alcohol, Behentrimonium Chloride, Bond Complex, Argan Oil
metadata.usage: Apply to mid-lengths and ends after shampooing, leave 2-3 minutes, rinse

name: Rose Petal Lip Oil
description: Nourishing lip treatment with rose extract. This luxurious oil provides intense moisture while imparting a subtle rose-gold shimmer. Perfect alone or over lipstick.

metadata.ingredients: Jojoba Oil, Rose Hip Oil, Vitamin E, Rose Extract, Mica
metadata.usage: Apply to lips as needed, perfect alone or over lipstick

name: Complete Skincare Set
description: The perfect introduction to Lumebondé skincare. Includes our hero Radiance Serum and Hydra Glow Moisturizer for a complete morning and evening routine. Save 10% vs individual products.

name: Hair Repair Duo
description: Complete bond repair system. Our shampoo and conditioner work together to rebuild hair from within. Save 12% vs individual products.

name: Holiday Gift Set
description: Limited edition holiday collection. Includes our bestselling Radiance Serum, two Rose Petal Lip Oils, and deluxe samples. Perfect for gifting or treating yourself. Save 15%.

name: Balancing Toner
description: pH balancing formula that preps skin for serums and moisturizers while providing gentle exfoliation. Contains 5% glycolic acid and soothing aloe vera.

metadata.ingredients: Water, Witch Hazel, Glycolic Acid (5%), Niacinamide, Aloe Vera

name: Overnight Repair Mask
description: Intensive overnight treatment that works while you sleep to repair and restore skin's natural barrier. With retinol, peptides, and bakuchiol for visible results by morning.

metadata.ingredients: Water, Squalane, Retinol, Peptides, Ceramides, Bakuchiol

name: Hydrating Face Mist
description: Refreshing facial mist for instant hydration boost anytime, anywhere. Perfect for setting makeup, mid-day refresh, or post-workout. Travel-friendly formula.

metadata.ingredients: Rose Water, Hyaluronic Acid, Glycerin, Cucumber Extract, Aloe Vera

name: Hair Finishing Oil
description: Lightweight shine treatment that tames frizz and adds brilliant shine without weighing hair down. UV filters protect color from fading.

metadata.ingredients: Argan Oil, Camellia Oil, Silicones, Vitamin E, UV Filters

name: Serum Sample 5ml
description: Deluxe sample of our bestselling Radiance Serum. Perfect for trial or travel. Includes 3-4 applications.

name: Moisturizer Sample 7ml
description: Deluxe sample of our Hydra Glow Moisturizer. Perfect for trial or travel. Includes 5-6 applications.

name: Shampoo Sachet 10ml
description: Single-use sachet of Silk Repair Shampoo. Perfect for events, travel, or sampling our bond repair technology.
